stats.value:
Epiphany Bonus

When entering Chaos, obtain 1 random Rare Card with an activated Epiphany.


・8x Common Growth Stone of Order・10000 Units

Upgrade Basic Cards

Increase Damage, Shield Gain, and Heal Amounts of Basic Cards by 2%


・4x Common Growth Stone of Order・3000 Units

Upgrade Neutral Cards

Increase Damage, Shield Gain, and Heal Amounts of Common Cards by 2%


・5x Great Growth Stone of Order・16000 Units

Basic Card Proficiency

Decrease Heal Amount of the Barrier Deployment card to 70%, and add a 70% Shield effect.


・16x Great Growth Stone of Order・24000 Units

Upgrade Unique Cards

Increase Damage, Shield Gain, and Heal Amounts of Unique Cards by 2%


・8x Great Growth Stone of Order・20000 Units

Health Proficiency
    
    
    

Increase Defense by 1.6%


・16x Premium Growth Stone of Order・28000 Units

Basic Card Proficiency

+5% Heal and Shield Gain Amounts to Archetype cards. If Tiphera's Defense is greater tan 250, add an additional +5% to the modifier


・16x Premium Growth Stone of Order・2x Shards of Condemnation・60000 Units

Attack Proficiency
    
    

+2% Critical Chance


・120x Premium Growth Stone of Order・42000 Units

Upgrade Unique Stats

If Tiphera's Defense is greater than 300, at the start of battle, +10% to Critical Damage of allies


・36x Premium Growth Stone of Order・2x Shards of Condemnation・80000 Units

Epiphany Bonus

Upon entering Chaos, you obtain 1 random Rare card through Epiphany.


・8x Common Growth Stone of Passion・10000 Units

Upgrade Neutral Cards

・16x Great Growth Stone of Passion・24000 Units

Upgrade Unique Cards

・8x Great Growth Stone of Passion・20000 Units
